title: Quality Railway
description: Experience authentic Chinese rail content that seamlessly integrates with major train mods!
body: ### Quality Railway - Authentic Chinese Rail Content for Minecraft 🚂 Experience the Spirit of Chinese Railways! Quality Railway adds meticulously crafted Chinese railway vehicles, functional details, and immersive ambiance to your Minecraft world. Designed to complement major rail mods, it enriches your builds with iconic rolling stock and authentic railway atmosphere. ## Key Features: ### Iconic Chinese Freight Cars: ▶️ C70 Gondola: Haul coal, ore, and bulk goods with China’s standard open-top freight car. ▶️ GQ70 Tank Car: Transport liquids or gases in this widely recognized tank wagon. ▶️DF4D locomotive: China Railway took the speed-up main locomotive three times and felt the crazy speed of 153Km/h from Minister Liu! ▶️DF7G locomotive: a new era shunting locomotive, diesel engine roars non-stop. ### Immersive Railway Details: ▶️ Departure Bell: Recreate station ambiance with the classic "ding-ding" boarding chime (placeable block). ▶️ Railway Ballast: Realistic crushed stone track foundation blocks for authentic rail lines. ▶️ Signs: Multiple railway signs meticulously crafted based on the standards of the Ministry of Railways. ### Dual-Tone Horns: - High-Pitched Air Horn: Piercing traditional steam/diesel whistle. - Low-Pitched Electric Horn: Deep, modern horn for electric locomotives. ### Ticket System: - Red Ticket: Classic nostalgic old-style ticket. - Blue Ticket: New magnetic medium ticket. - Ticket Machine: National Railway-style ticket vending machine, right-click to purchase tickets. - Depart/Arrive Gates: Used for ticket inspection, helping to complete your railway ticket system. ## Compatibility: 🔧 This is a content add-on, not a full rail system. Quality Railway shines when paired with established infrastructure mods: Create: Leverage kinetic power for moving trains. MTR Mod: Integrate cars into advanced metro/rail networks. (Also compatible with Railcraft, Immersive Railroading, etc.)Perfect For: Building realistic Chinese rail yards & stations Enhancing freight operations in Create/MTR worlds Adding cultural authenticity to server projects Railway enthusiasts & detail-oriented builders | Create Mod Version | Quality Raiway Version/1.21.1 | Quality Raiway Version/1.20.1 | Quality Raiway Version/1.19.2 | Quality Raiway Version/1.18.2 | | ------------------ | ----------------------------- | ----------------------------- | ----------------------------- | ----------------------------- | | Needless | From 1.5.1-release,To 1.5.2-release | From 1.1-release,To 1.5.2-release | From 1.1-release,To 1.5.2-release | From 1.0-beta,To 1.5.2-release | ## Support & Feedback: Encounter issues? Please report bugs or crashes on our [Github issuse](https://github.com/rtmmtr2/Quality-Railway/issues) page.For general questions, comment below! ## Localization (Translation) Work: Quality Railway now uses [Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/quality-railway/invite?h=872f9d1032868290729a32f455f62aab2618924) for localization work, and we welcome all players to participate. ## Pictures Images may contain some KUAYUE MOD content.
